data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for location-specific pricing.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement 'Location-specific pricing (downtown premium)', but the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations regarding the pricing differences based on location. While the use case mentions a 10% higher price downtown, there are no concrete API reads or persisted state checks that demonstrate this requirement is satisfied. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive due to a lack of evidence supporting the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of location-specific pricing being validated or confirmed.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify location-specific pricing.
